overall.description: A third-person perspective walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring wet neon-lit streets, futuristic vehicles, and holographic advertisements. The character navigates from a busy intersection into a secluded green courtyard area with benches and vegetation.

futuristic white sedan drives past on the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city street corner at night, with neon lights reflecting off wet pavement. A child in a yellow shirt runs nearby while a couple stands under a distinctive glowing purple umbrella. The character begins walking along the orange-tiled sidewalk as vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road.

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the sidewalk into the wide open intersection, surrounded by futuristic architecture including an overhead metal walkway and a cylindrical building wrapped in neon lights. Vehicles drive past on the wet reflective asphalt as the character navigates across the road.

approaching the entrance to a covered green courtyard area

segments.scene_description: Walking along the commercial sidewalk, the character crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk while passing a green holographic advertisement and a speed limit sign. A pedestrian with a glowing blue umbrella walks by as the character approaches a transition to a more secluded green area.

passing seated pedestrians on orange benches in the quiet courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character enters a sheltered green courtyard with glossy green tiled floors, leaving the busy street behind. Orange metal benches line the walkway where a few people sit quietly, and large planters with mature trees create a peaceful atmosphere contrasting with the neon-lit city outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, neon-drenched cyberpunk intersection into a secluded and peaceful green courtyard. It begins at a city street corner where neon lights reflect off wet pavement, passing a child in a yellow shirt and a couple under a glowing purple umbrella. As the camera moves from the orange-tiled sidewalk into a wide intersection, the environment opens up to reveal futuristic architecture, including an overhead metal walkway and a cylindrical building wrapped in neon. The scene then shifts back toward a commercial sidewalk, crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk past a green holographic advertisement and a pedestrian with a blue umbrella. Finally, the camera leaves the busy street behind to enter a sheltered courtyard with glossy green tiled floors, where orange metal benches and large planters with mature trees create a quiet sanctuary.
